description: Legal research, contract analysis, regulatory compliance, case law citation

connections.description: Legal compliance provides the regulatory framework behind privacy regulations
connections.when: legal compliance enhances PII privacy regulations

connections.description: Legal writing demands precise Bluebook-style citation
connections.when: legal compliance depends on citation management
connections.yields: citation management required patterns and guidance

connections.description: Fabricated case law or statutes cause real-world harm

connections.yields: anti hallucination required patterns and guidance

connections.description: Legal briefs and memoranda require persuasive writing craft
connections.when: legal compliance connects to creative writing
